data.biography: Atsumi Tanezaki (種﨑敦美) is a Japanese voice actress born on September 27. She was formerly affiliated with Toritori Office, but is now represented by Haikyō.
data.name: Atsumi Tanezaki

data.biography: 种崎敦美，日本女性声优，大分县出生。所属事务所为东京俳优生活协同组合代表作有《恐怖残响》三岛理沙、《邻座的怪同学》夏目朝子、《青春猪头少年不会梦到兔女郎学姐》双叶理央、《鬼灭之刃游郭篇》雏鹤、《魔法使的新娘》羽鸟智世、《一弦定音！》凤月里和、《SPY×FAMILY》阿尼亚·福杰、《秽翼的尤斯蒂娅》拉菲莉亚等。
data.name: 种崎敦美

data.biography: Atsumi Tanezaki (nacida el 27 de septiembre de 1990) es una actriz de voz japonesa que pertenece Haikyō. Anteriormente estuvo afiliada a Toritori Office.
data.name: Atsumi Tanezaki

data.biography: Ацумі Танедзакі — японська актриса озвучування, яка раніше була пов’язана з Офісом Торіторі, але тепер її представляє Хайкі.
data.name: Ацумі Танедзакі

data.biography: 種崎敦美是日本的女性聲優。出身於大分縣，所屬公司為東京俳優生活協同組合。
data.name: 種崎敦美

data.biography: 種崎敦美是日本的女性聲優。出身於大分縣，所屬公司為東京俳優生活協同組合。
data.name: 種崎敦美
อัตสึมิ ทาเนซากิ

data.biography: Atsumi Tanezaki (種﨑敦美) è una doppiatrice giapponese nata il 27 settembre. In passato era affiliata a Toritori Office, ma ora è rappresentata da Haikyō.
data.name: Atsumi Tanezaki

data.biography:
Zhou Cheng Ao, born on July 15, 1992, is a Chinese actor. He studied abroad when he was younger. While abroad he was part of a small band as the guitarist and lead singer. He also did different sports such as football, tennis, ice skating, and others.

After his return to China, he was accepted into the Performance Department of the Shanghai Theatre Academy and graduated in 2015. He entered the entertainment industry in 2016 with his role in the drama "Youth Friends Circle".
data.name: Zhou Chengao

data.biography:
周澄奥，7月15日出生，中国内地影视男演员。

　　2015年，周澄奥毕业于上海戏剧学院表演系；同年，进入国家话剧院出演话剧。2016年，因参演青春话题剧《青春朋友圈》步入演艺圈 。2017年，凭借青春校园网络剧《你好，旧时光》受到关注；同年他还参演了青春励志剧《悲伤逆流成河》 。2019年主演悬疑爱情剧《我心深触》。
data.name: 周澄奥

data.biography:
周澄奧，7 月 15 日出生，中國內地影視男演員。

2015 年，周澄奧畢業於上海戲劇學院表演系；同年，進入國家話劇院出演話劇。2016 年，因參演青春話題劇《青春朋友圈》步入演藝圈 。2017 年，憑藉青春校園網絡劇《你好，舊時光》受到關注；同年他還參演了青春勵志劇《悲傷逆流成河》 。2019 年主演懸疑愛情劇《我心深觸》。
data.name: 周澄奧

data.biography: Matt Lauria is an American actor and musician. He is best known for his roles as Luke Cafferty on Friday Night Lights, Ryan York on Parenthood, and Ryan Wheeler on Kingdom. A graduate of the University of North Carolina School of the Arts, Lauria has also appeared in CSI: Vegas, Dickinson, and numerous film and television projects.
data.name: Matt Lauria

data.biography: 马修·劳里亚 （Matthew Lauria） 是一位美国演员，以其在 NBC 的“周五夜灯”中饰演足球运动员卢克·卡弗蒂 （Luke Cafferty） 的系列常规角色而闻名。他在 NBC 电视剧《为人父母》中反复扮演梅·惠特曼的情人瑞安·约克。他目前在DirecTV体育剧集《王国》中饰演陷入困境的前综合格斗冠军瑞恩·惠勒（Ryan Wheeler）。
data.name: 马修·劳里亚

data.biography: 馬修·勞里亞 （Matthew Lauria） 是一位美國演員，以其在 NBC 的“週五夜燈”中飾演足球運動員盧克·卡弗蒂 （Luke Cafferty） 的系列常規角色而聞名。他在 NBC 電視劇《為人父母》中反覆扮演梅·惠特曼的情人瑞安·約克。他目前在 DirecTV 體育劇集《王國》中飾演陷入困境的前綜合格鬥冠軍瑞恩·惠勒（Ryan Wheeler）。
data.name: 馬修·勞里亞

data.biography: Shek Sau (Chinese: 石修) is a Hong Kong film and television actor. He mostly worked for TVB.
data.name: Shek Sau

data.biography: 石修是香港影视演员。他主要在TVB工作。他的儿子陈宇琛也是一名演员。
石修是香港影視演員。他主要在 TVB 工作。他的兒子陳宇琛也是一名演員。
data.name: 石修

data.biography: Thạch Tu, tên thật là Trần Thạc Tu, tên tiếng Anh là Bill sinh ngày 21/11/1947, ông là một trong những diễn viên trụ cột của đài truyền hình TVB trong thập niên 70, 80
data.name: Thạch Tu

data.biography:
Xu Ziyin, internationally known as Roada Xu, is a Chinese singer from T Entertainment.

As a teenager, she passed trainee auditions for CUBE, JYP and SM, but did not sign as a trainee. She graduated from Beijing Film Academy. In 2018, she participated in her first singing and dancing TV competition, and made her actress debut a year later. She also entered iQIYI's idol program Youth With You 2 in March 2020, where she reached the finale. Aside from Mandarin, Xu is also fluent in English and Korean.
data.name: Roada Xu
